##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Bob Jenkins
##DESCRIPTION=Clusters of colorless pyramidal crystals. We have posted cell parameters that match those in the literature, but do not represent the correct cell. The crystals are twinned.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
